Parse a UTC offset string in the format UTC+H, UTC-H, UTC+HH, UTC-HH, UTC+H:MM, UTC-HH:MM. Returns the UTC offset in minutes (east-positive), or undefined if invalid.

Parse a date string (YYYY-MM-DD) to start-of-day timestamp based on interpretation mode. Returns undefined if invalid.
